/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libmaxcomp.so -o libmaxcomp.so CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/core.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/analyzer/analyzer.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/preprocess/bwt.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/preprocess/delta.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/preprocess/rle.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/model/context.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/entropy/huffman.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/entropy/ans.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/entropy/fse.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/optimizer/genetic.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/lz/lz_compress.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/lz/bt_match.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/lz/hc_match.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/lz/lzrc.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/lz/lz_decompress.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/lz/lz_multistream.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/lz/lz24.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/lz_fast/mcx_lz_fast_compress.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/lz_fast/mcx_lz_fast_decompress.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/babel/babel_transform.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/babel/babel_stride.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/preprocess/rle2.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/preprocess/e8e9.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/preprocess/lzp.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/preprocess/nibble_split.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/entropy/adaptive_ac.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/entropy/multi_rans.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/entropy/range_coder.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/cm/cm.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/external/divsufsort/divsufsort.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/external/divsufsort/sssort.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/external/divsufsort/trsort.c.o CMakeFiles/maxcomp_shared.dir/external/divsufsort/utils.c.o  -lm
